Shinkai-sunset: Warm amber light bleeding into rose-tinted clouds, cerulean sky depths, honey-gold highlights on lens flares and nostalgia.
Ghibli-pastoral: Emerald grass fields, cream clouds drifting lazily, warm amber sunlight through windows, gentle sky-blue horizons and peace.
Akira-neon: Electric magenta signage bleeding into cyan light trails, violent electric-violet energy bursts, oil-black urban shadows and dystopia.
Mononoke-spirit: Moss-emerald forest depths, ink-black shadows concealing spirits, pearl-white kodama gleaming, deep-violet supernatural energy swirling mysteriously.
Demon-Slayer: Deep indigo night skies, crimson blood spray and breathing effects, gold sword gleams, snow-white contrast for drama.
Blade-Runner-Tokyo: Neon-magenta advertisements reflecting in rain-black puddles, cyan holographic displays, warm amber street lamps cutting through darkness.
Kiki-warmth: Terracotta European rooftops, cream bakery interiors, red-roof townscapes, warm-blue coastal skies evoking cozy nostalgia and independence.
Samurai-Champloo: Deep black silhouettes and shadows, blood-red accents, gold decorative elements, earth-brown landscapes blending hip-hop with feudal Japan.
Kawaii-pastel: Soft pastel-pink backgrounds, mint accents for sweetness, butter-yellow highlights, lavender shadows creating gentle shoujo dreamscapes and sparkles.
Rainy-cyberpunk: Deep indigo night rainfall, neon-pink advertisements glowing wetly, rain-silver reflections on asphalt, black-puddle mirrors doubling city lights.
Your-Name: Twilight sunset-rose merging with radiant gold comet trails, royal-blue dusk depth, silver starlight threading through dimensional longing.
Ghost-in-Shell: Icy-blue digital atmospheres, chrome metallic surfaces reflecting consciousness, neon-pink data streams, dark-teal shadows concealing cyborg existentialism.
Cowboy-Bebop: Smoky amber jazz-club lighting, worn teal upholstery and spacecraft panels, faded beige nostalgia, deep black space loneliness.
5cm-per-second: Delicate sakura-pink petals drifting slowly, warm gold afternoon rays, pastel-blue distance and separation, cream melancholy softness.
Studio-Ghibli-forest: Rich emerald canopy light, thick moss undergrowth, dappled sun-gold filtering through leaves, shadow-brown ancient tree wisdom.
Dark-seinen-noir: Harsh charcoal city grit, blood-red violence splatter, amber-highlight cigarette glow, stark bone-white morality contrasts and despair.
Taisho-era: Deep indigo kimono silk, ornate gold-kanji calligraphy, romantic rose blush, cream paper lanterns glowing with period elegance.
Festival-matsuri: Vibrant red-lantern glow at summer nights, shimmering gold decorations, deep-blue yukata patterns, white-paper masks and celebration joy.
Zen-minimal: Pure white negative space breathing, black-ink brushstroke precision, smooth stone-grey tranquility, single accent-red focal point meditation.
Autumn-momiji: Brilliant crimson maple leaves cascading, burnished gold sunlight, deep-brown tree bark and earth, pale-blue-sky crispness and transience.
Cherry-blossom-spring: Delicate sakura-pink petals floating gently, fresh pale-green new leaves, soft cream clouds, clear sky-blue rebirth and hope.
Shoujo-sparkle: Luminous soft-pink romance bubbles, sparkle-white star effects, dreamy pastel-blue backgrounds, gold trim creating magical girl transformation sequences.
Akira-decay: Rust-orange industrial wreckage, sickly green chemical glow, concrete-grey devastation, dried-blood brown creating post-apocalyptic Tokyo destruction and mutation.
Violet-Evergarden: Powder-blue letterpress stationery, soft lavender memory tints, pearl-white lace details, gold fountain-pen ink capturing emotional postwar correspondence.
Gundam-space: Void-black cosmos silence, mobile-suit white armor plating, beam-saber pink energy discharge, colony-blue Earth glow during mecha warfare.
Nichijou-chaos: Bright sunshine-yellow comedy energy, bubblegum-pink absurdity, sky-blue innocence, stark white reaction faces creating hyperactive slice-of-life explosions.
Mushishi-ethereal: Pale jade mushi essence, misty grey-white fog banks, amber lantern warmth, forest-green stillness evoking supernatural folklore mystery.
Tokyo-Godfathers: Dirty snow-grey winter streets, neon-orange pachinko light, faded denim-blue desperation, red-scarf warmth during Christmas Eve redemption.
Redline-adrenaline: Hot-rod candy-red speed blur, electric-yellow racing flames, jet-black machine oil, chrome-silver engine gleam creating hand-drawn velocity madness.
Tatami-Galaxy: Sepia-brown nostalgic regret, rose-colored delusion tint, midnight-blue melancholy, cream tatami-mat warmth during surreal college-life time loops.
Made-in-Abyss: Abyssal midnight-blue crushing depths, bioluminescent teal creature glow, relic gold mystery, innocent peach skin contrasting darkness and wonder.
Evangelion-apocalypse: Toxic orange LCL fluid, sickly purple AT-field energy, clinical white NERV sterility, blood-red emergency lighting during psychological mecha horror.

Satoshi-Kon-reality: Bleeding vermillion dream transitions, paprika-orange hallucination warmth, royal-purple delusion depth, mirror-white fractured identity creating psychological thriller disorientation.
Ping-Pong-kinetic: Screaming cyan motion trails, sweat-yellow intensity, sketchy charcoal line work, table-green competitive surface capturing Yuasa's explosive energy style.
Lupin-III-heist: Playful bubblegum-pink Fiat chrome, emerald jewel glint, yellow Lupin jacket pop, midnight-blue caper shadows creating retro gentleman-thief escapades.
Mob-Psycho: Psychic plasma-pink explosion aura, nervous baby-blue awkwardness, esper-purple power surge, washed-out grey mundane reality creating ONE's signature contrast.
Weathering-With-You: Rain-soaked slate-grey Tokyo deluge, sunshine-girl gold breaking clouds, aqua-blue water droplets, hope-pink clearing skies during climate fantasy.
Attack-on-Titan: Dried-blood rust on blades, titan-flesh pink horror, scout-green cape fabric, stone-grey fortress walls creating brutal survival desperation aesthetic.
Sailor-Moon-magical: Bubblegum transformation pink, cosmic navy star field, tiara-gold crescent shine, ribbon-red accent creating nostalgic magical-girl justice sparkle.
Paprika-corridor: Kaleidoscope magenta dream liquid, tangerine parade chaos, deep plum subconscious mystery, porcelain-white doll uncanny creating Kon's surreal masterpiece aesthetic.
Trigun-western: Scorched sand-beige wasteland stretching endlessly, gunmetal-grey worn revolvers, tattered red-coat defiance, bleached-bone sun creating space-cowboy desolation.
Paranoia-Agent: Sickly hospital-green fluorescent hum, golden-bat gleaming menace, asphalt-black urban anonymity, psychiatric-white denial creating societal collapse anxiety.
Haikyuu-gymnasium: Polished orange volleyball arc, court-white boundary lines, navy-blue team uniform determination, varnished wood-brown floor reflecting sports passion energy.
Ergo-Proxy-industrial: Smog-grey dome city oppression, proxy-blue cold enlightenment, rust-brown decay and entropy, void-black existential questions creating dystopian philosophy.
Kaguya-psychological: Blush-pink warfare embarrassment, gold Shinomiya wealth, calculating ice-blue strategy, prestigious cream academy halls creating rom-com mind games tension.
Steins-Gate-lab: Cathode-green vintage monitor glow, time-machine banana-yellow absurdity, lab-coat white mad science, divergence-red worldline numbers creating conspiracy thriller atmosphere.

Revolutionary-Girl: Dueling-arena rose-pink symbolism, prince-purple idealistic fantasy, sword-silver dramatic clash, spotlight-gold theatrical illumination creating Ikuhara's abstract fairytale deconstruction.
Dorohedoro-grime: Sewage-green Hole district rot, gyoza-tan comfort food warmth, magic-smoke purple mystery, concrete-grey brutal violence creating grimy urban dark-fantasy.
Haibane-Renmei: Halo-gold gentle spirituality, wing-grey feathered emergence, old-town brick-red kindness, sky-wall blue salvation creating ABe's melancholic purgatory liminal space.
FLCL-adolescence: Vespa-yellow reckless youth, brain-exit teal confusion surge, guitar-red rebellion noise, can-never-go-back blue creating Gainax's coming-of-age chaos explosion.
